user.title: Dimplex Hub
user.description: Sign in with your Dimplex username and password below. If your account requires manual auth-code login, open this URL: {auth_url}. In browser DevTools, capture the final msal redirect URL (or copy only the code parameter) and paste it below.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Dimplex service.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance is allowed.
